tasks.label: ROS 2 - Build Devastator
args: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && colcon build --symlink-install --packages-select commun interface_pico robot_devastator robot_devastator_bringup

tasks.label: ROS 2 - Lancer interface Pico simulation
args: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch robot_devastator_bringup interface_pico_simulation.launch.yaml

tasks.label: ROS 2 - Lancer interface Pico réel
args: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch robot_devastator_bringup interface_pico_reel.launch.yaml

tasks.label: ROS 2 - Lancer autonomie simple simulation
args: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch robot_devastator_bringup autonomie_simple_simulation.launch.yaml

tasks.label: ROS 2 - Lancer autonomie simple réel
args: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch robot_devastator_bringup autonomie_simple_reel.launch.yaml
